bird.name: 褐短嘴旋木雀
bird.summary: 褐短嘴旋木雀（学名：Climacteris picumnus）为澳大利亚东部的一个特有种，属于雀形目短嘴旋木雀科。背部灰棕色或浅棕色，腹部有黑色条纹。目前记录有两个亚种。 参考资料 外部链接 Brown treecreeper (eastern subspecies): vul…

locations.name: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克
locations.summary: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克（荷蘭語：Coenraad Jacob Temminck，1778年3月31日—1858年1月30日）是一名荷蘭貴族和動物學家。 生平 特明克於阿姆斯特丹出生，1820年出任位於萊頓的國家自然歷史博物館，直至去世。他…

relations.subject: 褐短嘴旋木雀
relations.evidence: The brown treecreeper (Climacteris picumnus) is the largest Australasian treecreeper

relations.subject: 褐短嘴旋木雀
relations.evidence: The conservation status of the brown treecreeper is considered of "least concern" by the IUCN, while the subspecies victoriae, is listed in New South Wales as Vulnerable under Schedule 2 of the Threatened Species Conservation Act (1995). Subspecies victoriae is listed as nationally Vulnerable by DCCEEW (Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water), under the Environment Protection and Biodiversity Conservation Act (1999)
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

relations.subject: 褐短嘴旋木雀
relations.evidence: Threats to the species include land clearing and the resultant habitat loss and fragmentation, the impacts of which are thought to disrupt dispersal and therefore recruitment. The removal of fallen timber and other woody debris, and competition with exotic species such as the common starling for nesting hollows are also threats to the species. Subspecies melanotus has declined from eastern parts of its range in Cape York Peninsula, thought to be due to more extensive and frequent fire regime, which has affected fallen tree trunks and logs (a preferred foraging substrate for this species).{{Cite journal | last1 = Garnett | first1 = S
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
